_source: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index — https://artificialanalysis.ai (API: /api/v2/data/llms/models). Attribution to artificialanalysis.ai is required.
_note: Maps model slugs -> Artificial Analysis model slugs. The ranker (scripts/rank-ai-models.mjs) fetches all three ranking axes (intelligence, speed, cost) per AA slug via the AA API (needs ARTIFICIAL_ANALYSIS_API_KEY in .env). AA lists multiple variants per model (reasoning / non-reasoning / effort levels like -high/-medium/-low); the `aa` slug below pins the flagship reasoning variant we compare — we deliberately skip the effort-suffixed and -non-reasoning duplicates. Keys are vendor/model display ids (no longer used for lookups; AA is the sole live source). Curated to current-generation flagships across mainstream API-available providers; refresh with the NEW rows from: node -e listing intel>=40 not-yet-mapped (see git history).
